{"key_event":"Republican consolidation and liberal civic reforms","reasoning":"Republican control of national and local institutions, secular schools, and colonial/military expansion modestly raised an already strong state capacity, though Boulangism exposed political instability. Press freedom, union legalization, municipal elections, amnesty, and expanding labor/radical politics significantly strengthened organized civil society and its ability to contest authority.","society_change":0.6,"society_power":8.1,"state_change":0.2,"state_power":8.3}
